expectations.text: Phases are annotated with sprint numbers
expectations.evidence: No sprint annotations anywhere. Phases listed as plain '- [ ] **Phase N: Name** - description'
No sizing annotations on any phase

expectations.text: Sprint 1 contains at least 2 phases running in parallel
expectations.evidence: No sprint concept at all. All 6 phases are strictly sequential: 1->2->3->4->5->6
No sprints. Phase 1 'Foundation & Authentication' is mixed infra+auth, arguably demoable but not sprint-framed

expectations.text: Frontend and backend for the same feature are in the same sprint
expectations.evidence: No sprint grouping. Phases are sequential so no parallel frontend+backend work

expectations.text: The progress table includes Sprint and Size columns
expectations.evidence: Progress table only has: Phase | Status | Completed

expectations.text: A Sprint Summary table exists showing what is demoable after each sprint
No sprint is pure infrastructure with nothing demoable
expectations.evidence: No sprint concept. Phase 1 bundles foundation infra with auth (mixed).
